name: Vegetable Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 6 Chinese mushrooms, soaked in warm water
3 large celery stalks, shredded to about 3 inches
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the noodles until just done, about 4 minutes. Drain well and rinse in cold water. Mix in a little oil to prevent sticking.
2. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Stir-fry mushrooms, celery, bamboo shoots, and bean sprouts for about 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Add salt, broth, mushroom water, oyster sauce, and sugar. Push the vegetables to one side of the pan and add the noodles, stirring to warm everything through.
4. Mix in the remaining vegetables and adjust the thickness of the sauce by adding a teaspoon of cornstarch mixed with a teaspoon of water if desired.
